title: Verify existing implementation of search filter builder
description: The `buildSearchFilter(query: string, fields: string[]): object` function already exists in `src/services/search-filter.ts` with 8 passing tests in `src/services/search-filter.test.ts`. Implementation uses Payload `like` operator with `or` conditions for multi-field text search, consistent with the pattern in `course-search.ts`.
existing_patterns: src/services/course-search.ts:47-53 — same `like` operator with `or` conditions pattern for multi-field text search
